title: daiotyla xanthina
intro: Daiotyla xanthina, also known as Borage or Starflower, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and the Middle East, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for skin and eye health. The health benefits of Daiotyla xanthina include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, while its herbal preparations include oil extracts and dried flowers, which can be used in teas and infusions. Additionally, its seeds are rich in omega-6 fatty acids, which have been shown to support skin and hair health when consumed as a dietary supplement.
